prompt: Create a vertical cinematic triptych made of exactly 3 stacked horizontal panels, all showing the same elegant young East Asian woman with black hair in a low ponytail inside a modern airport terminal at golden hour. Panel 2: a realistic shoulder-up portrait of the same woman turning back over her shoulder toward the camera, soft shallow depth of field, blurred airport lights behind her, natural skin texture, delicate earrings, loose strands of hair framing her face, calm thoughtful expression. Panel 3: an extreme macro close-up of one of her eyes, showing detailed eyelashes, eyelid texture, tear line, glossy cornea, and a crisp reflection inside the iris of the airport concourse and the small full-body woman standing in it. Use photorealistic editorial fashion photography, high dynamic range, warm natural sunlight, cinematic contrast, accurate perspective, detailed reflections, no captions, no logos, no watermark. Canvas should be a tall vertical image with the three panels evenly stacked edge-to-edge, approximately 9:16.
